name: Strawberry Yogurt Freeze
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the yogurt if it is not premixed.
2. Spoon the yogurt into ice cube tray compartments.
3. Freeze until completely frozen for 3 or 4 hours.
4. Remove cubes from the tray and place them in a bowl of electric food processor.
5. Process until finely chopped.
6. Add strawberries and orange peel to the processed yogurt.
7. Process just until almost smooth.
8. Serve immediately or place back in the freezer and stir occasionally until firm enough to scoop for 1 to 2 hours.
9. Makes 6 1/2-cup servings.
10. Each serving: 90 calories, 3 grams protein, 18 grams carbohydrates, 1 gram fat, 41 milligrams sodium, 3 milligrams cholesterol.
